name: Manufacturing MCP Agent Flow
description: LangFlow-style design for a manufacturing AI Agent that routes user questions to MCP tools and returns evidence-based answers.

nodes.label: User Question
nodes.description: Receives a natural language question about manufacturing data.

nodes.label: Intent Router
nodes.description: Classifies the user question into defect_rate, machine_anomaly, line_performance, or quality_issue_candidates.

nodes.label: MCP Tool Selector
nodes.description: Selects the proper MCP tool based on the classified intent.

nodes.label: defect_rate_by_line
nodes.description: Calculates defect rate by production line.

nodes.label: machine_anomalies
nodes.description: Detects abnormal temperature, vibration, or pressure values.

nodes.label: line_performance
nodes.description: Summarizes productivity and quality status by line.

nodes.label: quality_issue_candidates
nodes.description: Infers candidate quality issue causes using defect and sensor data.

nodes.label: Evidence Formatter
nodes.description: Formats tool result summary and evidence according to grounded answer policy.

nodes.label: Answer Output
nodes.description: Returns answer, intent, tool_name, and evidence to the user.
